pi_items.source: Code execution of setup_task.sh which passes 'find_untested_reqs_project' to setup_task_project, explicitly appending '_project' to form the directory name 'find_untested_reqs_project_project'. The metadata claim is missing the second '_project'.
Physical inspection of the ExampleProject data directory provided in the environment. File exists and successfully parses.
Physical inspection of the ExampleProject data directory provided in the environment. File exists and successfully parses.
Confirmed via task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path.

privileged_info_summary: The test project directory is actually created at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/find_untested_reqs_project_project' (not 'find_untested_reqs_project'). Analysis of the raw JSON data reveals 138 valid software requirements in 'documents/SRS.json', 110 of which lack any verification links to 'documents/TESTS.json'. Examples of untested requirements include SRS-32, SRS-36, SRS-101, and SRS-102. The provided verifier script is critically broken: it checks the wrong file path and crashes with an AttributeError when trying to iterate over the JSON 'links' structure.
